basic_details.job_title: PAU Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has officially announced the Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026 with 01 opening. Candidates aged between 18 and 37 years holding a B.Sc. Agriculture (Hons.) with a minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks, an M.Sc. (Agricultural Economics) with a minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks, and Punjabi at the matriculation level are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their offline applications on or before 05 August 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Agri. (Hons.) with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks, M.Sc. (Agricultural Economics) with minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks, Punjabi at matriculation level from Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized board
qualification.details: B.Sc. Agri. (Hons.) with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks and M.Sc. (Agricultural Economics) with minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks. Must have passed Punjabi at matriculation level from Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized board.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Field Supervisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Field Supervisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PAU Field Supervisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Field Supervisor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: B.Sc. Agri. (Hons.) with minimum OCPA of 6.00/10.00 or 60% marks and M.Sc. (Agricultural Economics) with minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks. Must have passed Punjabi at matriculation level from Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized board.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Field Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Field Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Field Supervisor post at Punjab Agricultural University is 05 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Supervisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Sc. Agri. (Hons.) with at least 60% marks or an M.Sc. (Agricultural Economics) with at least 65% marks, along with Punjabi at the matriculation level.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Field Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Field Supervisor post is between 18 years and 37 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Supervisor position will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PAU Field Supervisor job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Field Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Field Supervisor post announced by Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for the Field Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by a Practical Test.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the PAU Field Supervisor application?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 200/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will lead you to the PAU website or a direct PDF download.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Field Supervisor position is a contractual role at Punjab Agricultural University.
